evidence_refs.source_quote: CHRISTMAS-NEW YEAR'S WEEK (Tuesday 12/22 – Monday 12/30)

tool_args.label: Christmas-New Year's Week 2025
tool_args.raw_text: CHRISTMAS-NEW YEAR'S WEEK (Tuesday 12/22 – Monday 12/30)

payload.description: Christmas-New Year's Week service adjustments with additional midday trains

evidence_refs.source_quote: CHRISTMAS-NEW YEAR'S WEEK (Tuesday 12/22 – Monday 12/30)
○ Suspend select morning rush-hour trains. ○ Operate 6 additional mid-day trains (2 Hudson, 1 Harlem, 3 New Haven). ○ Adjust train lengths to accommodate ridership levels.

tool_args.label: Christmas Eve 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Christmas Eve – Wednesday, 12/24/2025

payload.description: Metro-North Friday Service schedule with adjustments

evidence_refs.source_quote: Christmas Eve – Wednesday, 12/24/2025
○ Several AM and PM peak trains will not operate. ○ 6 additional midday trains will run (2 Hudson, 1 Harlem, 3 New Haven).

tool_args.label: Christmas Day 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Christmas Day – Thursday 12/25/2025

payload.description: Special holiday schedule with hourly service on mainlines and branch service

evidence_refs.source_quote: Christmas Day – Thursday 12/25/2025

○ Hourly service on the Lower Hudson, Upper Hudson, Mid-Harlem, Upper Harlem, Inner New Haven, and Outer New Haven Lines. ○ Service every hour on the New Canaan Branch and every two hours on the Wassaic Branch. ○ Service every three hours on the Danbury and Waterbury Branches.

tool_args.label: New Year's Eve 2025
tool_args.raw_text: New Year's Eve – Wednesday 12/31/2025

payload.description: Special one-day schedule with extra trains after midnight

evidence_refs.source_quote: New Year's Eve – Wednesday 12/31/2025

○ Extra Trains will run after midnight to accommodate customers traveling home from the Times Square Ball Drop. ○ As in past years, customers traveling on early morning New Years' service will have tickets collected prior to boarding trains at Grand Central.
